{
  "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useFetch } from \"@/components/useFetch\";\nimport { Crosshair, ExternalLink, RefreshCw } from \"lucide-react\";\n\ntype Snapshot = {\n  id: string;\n  competitor: string;\n  url: string;\n  kind: string;\n  title: string;\n  captured_at: number;\n  snapshot_text: string;\n};\n\nconst KINDS = [\"\", \"pricing\", \"landing\", \"ad\", \"review\", \"social\"];\n\nexport default function CompetitiveIntelPage() {\n  const [kind, setKind] = useState(\"\");\n  const { data, loading, error } = useFetch<{ snapshots: Snapshot[] }>(`/api/competitive-intelligence${kind ? `?kind=${kind}` : \"\"}`);\n\n  const competitors = data ? [...new Set(data.snapshots.map((s) => s.competitor))] : [];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50\">\n      <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8 space-y-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between flex-wrap gap-3\">\n          <div>\n            <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2\">\n              <Crosshair className=\"w-7 h-7 text-rose-500\" /> Competitive Intelligence\n            </h1>\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-gray-600\">\n              Competitor landing, pricing & ad snapshots. Run{\" \"}\n              <code className=\"text-xs bg-slate-100 px-1 rounded\">POST /api/ingest/run?source=competitor</code> to refresh.\n            </p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\">\n          {KINDS.map((k) => (\n            <button\n              key={k}\n              onClick={() => setKind(k)}\n              className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold rounded-lg transition ${\n                kind === k ? \"bg-rose-600 text-white\" : \"bg-white border text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50\"\n              }`}\n            >\n              {k || \"All\"}\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n\n        {loading && <div className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">Loading snapshots…</div>}\n        {error && <div className=\"text-sm text-rose-600\">Error: {error}</div>}\n\n        {data && (\n          <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n            {competitors.map((comp) => {\n              const shots = data.snapshots.filter((s) => s.competitor === comp);\n              return (\n                <div key={comp} className=\"bg-white border rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm\">\n                  <h2 className=\"font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 mb-3\">{comp}</h2>\n                  <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n                    {shots.map((s) => (\n                      <div key={s.id} className=\"border rounded-lg p-3\">\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-2\">\n                          <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 px-2 py-0.5 rounded\">{s.kind}</span>\n                          <a href={s.url} target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer\" className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-indigo-500\">\n                            <ExternalLink className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5\" />\n                          </a>\n                        </div>\n                        <div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-gray-800 mb-1 truncate\">{s.title || s.url}</div>\n                        <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 line-clamp-4\">{s.snapshot_text.slice(0, 400)}…</p>\n                      </div>\n                    ))}\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              );\n            })}\n            {data.snapshots.length === 0 && (\n              <div className=\"text-center text-slate-400 py-12\">\n                No snapshots yet. Run the competitor ingest to capture them.\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}",

**tool `write`** completed
```input
{
  "content": "import { NextRequest } from \"next/server\";\nimport { json } from \"@/lib/api-helpers\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\n\n/**\n * GET /api/social — social listening feed.\n * Aggregates marketing publications (wire_articles + ingest_web) by category\n * to surface trending topics for social content planning.\n */\nexport async function GET(_req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    // Topic volume from publications\n    const topics = (db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS volume FROM (\n           SELECT category FROM wire_articles\n           UNION ALL\n           SELECT category FROM ingest_web\n         ) GROUP BY category ORDER BY volume DESC`,\n      )\n      .all() as { category: string; volume: number }[])\n      .filter((t) => t.category);\n\n    // Recent articles for the feed\n    const feed = (db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT title, url, source, summary, category, COALESCE(published_at, fetched_at) AS ts FROM (\n           SELECT title, url, source, summary, category, published_at, fetched_at, 'wire' AS origin FROM wire_articles\n           UNION ALL\n           SELECT title, url, source, summary, category, published_at, fetched_at, 'ingest' AS origin FROM ingest_web\n         ) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 30`,\n      )\n      .all() as { title: string; url: string; source: string; summary: string; category: string; ts: number }[])\n      .map((r) => ({ ...r, origin: r.source }));\n\n    return json({ topics, feed });\n  } catch (e) {\n    const message = e instanceof Error ? e.message : \"Failed to load social feed\";\n    return json({ error: message }, 500);\n  }\n}",
  "filePath": "/home/uzer/marketing-hub/src/app/api/social/route.ts"
}
```

Math.max(...data.topics.map((t) => t.volume), 1) : 1;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50\">\n      <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8 space-y-6\">\n        <div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <Share2 className=\"w-7 h-7 text-sky-500\" /> Social\n          </h1>\n          <p className=\"mt-1 text-gray-600\">\n            Social listening — trending marketing topics from across publications, ready to spin into posts.\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        {loading && <div className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">Loading…</div>}\n        {error && <div className=\"text-sm text-rose-600\">Error: {error}</div>}\n\n        {data && (\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n            {/* Topic volume */}\n            <div className=\"bg-white border rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm\">\n              <h2 className=\"font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2\">\n                <TrendingUp className=\"w-4 h-4 text-sky-500\" /> Trending Topics\n              </h2>\n              <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                {data.topics.map((t) => (\n                  <div key={t.category} className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n                    <div className=\"w-24 text-sm text-slate-600 capitalize truncate\">{t.category}</div>\n                    <div className=\"flex-1 h-6 rounded bg-slate-100 overflow-hidden\">\n                      <div className=\"h-full bg-sky-500 flex items-center justify-end pr-2 text-xs font-semibold text-white\" style={{ width: `${Math.max(8, (t.volume / maxVol) * 100)}%` }}>\n                        {t.volume}\n                      </div>\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                ))}\n                {data.topics.length === 0 && <div className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">No topics yet.</div>}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n\n            {/* Feed */}\n            <div className=\"lg:col-span-2 bg-white border rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm\">\n              <h2 className=\"font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4\">Content Feed</h2>\n              <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                {data.feed.map((f, i) => (\n                  <a key={i} href={f.url} target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer\" className=\"block border-b pb-3 last:border-0 hover:bg-slate-50 -mx-2 px-2 rounded transition\">\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-400 mb-1\">\n                      <span className=\"font-semibold text-sky-600\">{f.source}</span>\n                      <span className=\"capitalize bg-slate-100 px-1.5 rounded\">{f.category}</span>\n                      <ExternalLink className=\"w-3 h-3 ml-auto\" />\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-gray-900\">{f.title}</div>\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 line-clamp-2 mt-0.5\">{f.summary}</p>\n                  </a>\n                ))}\n                {data.feed.length === 0 && <div className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">No articles yet. Run the web ingest to populate.</div>}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}",

### [assistant] 2026-07-13T22:06:19.699000+00:00  @glm-5.2


`pillar_content` exists with a rich schema. I'll build the content surface as a pillar content manager reusing this table. Let me create the API + page.

```input
{
  "content": "import { NextRequest } from \"next/server\";\nimport { json } from \"@/lib/api-helpers\";\nimport { db, now, uid } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\n\n/** GET /api/content — list pillar content. POST — create. */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const status = new URL(req.url).searchParams.get(\"status\") || undefined;\n    const rows = status\n      ? db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM pillar_content WHERE status = ? ORDER BY COALESCE(occurred_at, created_at) DESC LIMIT 100`).all(status)\n      : db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM pillar_content ORDER BY COALESCE(occurred_at, created_at) DESC LIMIT 100`).all();\n    return json({ items: rows });\n  } catch (e) {\n    return json({ error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : \"Failed\" }, 500);\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const id = uid(\"pillar\");\n    const t = now();\n    db.prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO pillar_content (id, title, source, raw_content, key_insights, status, source_url, notes, created_at, updated_at, workspace_id)\n       VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,\n    ).run(\n      id,\n      String(body.title || \"\"),\n      String(body.source || \"manual\"),\n      String(body.raw_content || \"\"),\n      String(body.key_insights || \"\"),\n      String(body.status || \"draft\"),\n      String(body.source_url || \"\"),\n      String(body.notes || \"\"),\n      t,\n      t,\n      \"default\",\n    );\n    return json({ id }, 201);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return json({ error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : \"Create failed\" }, 500);\n  }\n}",
  "filePath": "/home/uzer/marketing-hub/src/app/api/content/route.ts"
}

string;\n  title: string;\n  source: string;\n  status: string;\n  key_insights: string;\n  source_url: string;\n  created_at: number;\n};\n\nexport default function ContentPage() {\n  const { data, loading, error, reload } = useFetch<{ items: Item[] }>(\"/api/content\");\n  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);\n  const [form, setForm] = useState({ title: \"\", source: \"manual\", key_insights: \"\", source_url: \"\", status: \"draft\" });\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n\n  const save = async () => {\n    setSaving(true);\n    try {\n      await fetch(\"/api/content\", { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" }, body: JSON.stringify(form) });\n      setForm({ title: \"\", source: \"manual\", key_insights: \"\", source_url: \"\", status: \"draft\" });\n      setShowForm(false);\n      reload();\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const STATUS_COLOR: Record<string, string> = { draft: \"#94a3b8\", research: \"#0ea5e9\", writing: \"#f59e0b\", published: \"#22c55e\" };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50\">\n      <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 POST — create. */\nexport async function GET(_req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const rows = db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM positioning_statements ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100`).all();\n    return json({ items: rows });\n  } catch (e) {\n    return json({ error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : \"Failed\" }, 500);\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const id = uid(\"pos\");\n    const t = now();\n    db.prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO positioning_statements (id, workspace, target, frame_of_reference, points_of_difference, reasons_to_believe, brand_character, one_word_positioning, notes, created_at, updated_at, workspace_id)\n       VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,\n    ).run(\n      id, \"default\",\n      String(body.target || \"\"), String(body.frame_of_reference || \"\"),\n      String(body.points_of_difference || \"\"), String(body.reasons_to_believe || \"\"),\n      String(body.brand_character || \"\"), String(body.one_word_positioning || \"\"),\n      String(body.notes || \"\"), t, t, \"default\",\n    );\n    return json({ id }, 201);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return json({ error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : \"Create failed\" }, 500);\n  }\n}",

src/components/useFetch.ts
---
// Tiny client-side data hook to keep page code DRY.
"use client";
import { useEffect, useCallback, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { useToast } from "./Toast";

export function useFetch<T = Record<string, unknown>>(
  url: string | null,
  opts?: { silent?: boolean },
) {
  const [data, setData] = useState<T | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const toast = useToast();
  const silent = opts?.silent ?? false;
  const firstLoad = useRef(true);

  const reload = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!url) return;
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url, { cache: "no-store" });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
      const json: T = await res.json();
      setData(json);
    } catch (e) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
      setError(msg);
      if (!silent && !firstLoad.current) {
        toast.error("Couldn't load data", msg);
      }
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
      firstLoad.current = false;
    }
  }, [url, silent, toast]);

  useEffect(() => {
    reload();
  }, [reload]);

```

These ship as manual-entry + seed apps. Each needs: a migration table (created lazily), a lib module with CRUD + seed, an API route, and a page. 

To do this efficiently at scale (12 surfaces), I'll create a **generic seed-surface framework**: one shared lib that creates a table + CRUD for any named surface, plus per-surface config. This avoids 12× duplicated code. Let me build the framework.

**tool `write`** completed
```input
{
  "content": "/**\n * Seed-surface framework — generic manual-entry surfaces backed by their own\n * SQLite table, created lazily via a self-healing migration.\n *\n * Each surface is identified by a slug (e.g. \"podcast\", \"video\") and has:\n *  - a dedicated table `seed_<slug>` (id, title, status, category, body, url,\n *    meta JSON, created_at, updated_at)\n *  - CRUD via listSeed/createSeed\n *  - a seed of realistic sample rows on first access\n *\n * This lets the 12 no-scrape-source surfaces ship now as manual-entry apps\n * with adapter hooks left for future ingest.\n */\nimport { db, now, uid } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport interface SeedSurfaceConfig {\n  slug: string;\n  label: string;\n  icon?: string;\n  statuses: string[];\n  categories: string[];\n  seed: { title: string; status: string; category: string; body: string; url?: string; meta?: Record<string, unknown> }[];\n}\n\nexport interface SeedRow {\n  id: string;\n  title: string;\n  status: string;\n  category: string;\n  body: string;\n  url: string;\n  meta: Record<string, unknown>;\n  created_at: number;\n  updated_at: number;\n}\n\nconst TABLE = (slug: string) => `seed_${slug.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, \"_\").toLowerCase()}`;\nconst seeded = new Set<string>();\n\n/** Lazily create the surface table + seed it once. */\nexport function ensureSeedSurface(cfg: SeedSurfaceConfig): void {\n  const table = TABLE(cfg.slug);\n  if (seeded.has(table)) return;\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${table} (\n      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n      title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',\n      category TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',\n      body TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n      url TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n      meta TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',\n      created_at INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL\n    );\n    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_${table}_status ON ${table}(status);\n    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_${table}_cat ON ${table}(category);\n  `);\n  // seed once if empty\n  const count = (db.prepare(`SELECT COUNT(*) c FROM ${table}`).get() as { c: number }).c;\n  if (count === 0 && cfg.seed.length > 0) {\n    const stmt = db.prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO ${table} (id, title, status, category, body, url, meta, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,\n    );\n    const t = now();\n    for (const s of cfg.seed) {\n      stmt.run(uid(cfg.slug), s.title, s.status, s.category, s.body, s.url || \"\", JSON.stringify(s.meta || {}), t, t);\n    }\n  }\n  seeded.add(table);\n}\n\n/** List rows for a surface. */\nexport function listSeed(slug: string, status?: string, limit = 100): SeedRow[] {\n  const table = TABLE(slug);\n  const rows = status\n    ? db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM ${table} WHERE status = ? ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT ?`).all(status, limit)\n    : db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM ${table} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT ?`).all(limit);\n  return (rows as Record<string, unknown>[]).map((r) => ({\n    id: String(r.id),\n    title: String(r.title),\n    status: String(r.status),\n    category: String(r.category),\n    body: String(r.body || \"\"),\n    url: String(r.url || \"\"),\n    meta: (() => { try { return JSON.parse(String(r.meta || \"{}\")); } catch { return {}; } })(),\n    created_at: Number(r.created_at) || 0,\n    updated_at: Number(r.updated_at) || 0,\n  }));\n}\n\n/** Create a row for a surface. */\nexport function createSeed(slug: string, input: { title: string; status?: string; category?: string; body?: string; url?: string; meta?: Record<string, unknown> }): string {\n  const table = TABLE(slug);\n  const id = uid(slug);\n  const t = now();\n  db.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO ${table} (id, title, status, category, body, url, meta, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,\n  ).run(id, input.title, input.status || \"draft\", input.category || \"general\", input.body || \"\", input.url || \"\", JSON.stringify(input.meta || {}), t, t);\n  return id;\n}",
  "filePath": "/home/uzer/marketing-hub/src/lib/seed-surface.ts"
}
```

### [assistant] 2026-07-13T22:10:24.966000+00:00  @glm-5.2


Now a generic API route pattern. Since Next.js App Router needs a file per route, I'll create one dynamic API route `/api/seed/[slug]/route.ts` that handles all 12 surfaces.

**tool `write`** completed
```input
{
  "content": "import { NextRequest } from \"next/server\";\nimport { json } from \"@/lib/api-helpers\";\nimport { ensureSeedSurface, listSeed, createSeed } from \"@/lib/seed-surface\";\nimport { SEED_SURFACES } from \"@/lib/seed-surfaces\";\n\nexport const dynamic = \"force-dynamic\";\n\nconst BY_SLUG = new Map(SEED_SURFACES.map((s) => [s.slug, s]));\n\n/** GET /api/seed/[slug] — list rows. POST — create a row. */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: { slug: string } }) {\n  try {\n    const cfg = BY_SLUG.get(params.slug);\n    if (!cfg) return json({ error: \"Unknown surface\" }, 404);\n    ensureSeedSurface(cfg);\n    const status = new URL(req.url).searchParams.get(\"status\") || undefined;\n    return json({ items: listSeed(cfg.slug, status), config: { statuses: cfg.statuses, categories: cfg.categories, label: cfg.label } });\n  } catch (e) {\n    return json({ error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : \"Failed\" }, 500);\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: { slug: string } }) {\n  try {\n    const cfg = BY_SLUG.get(params.slug);\n    if (!cfg) return json({ error: \"Unknown surface\" }, 404);\n    ensureSeedSurface(cfg);\n    const body = await req.json();\n    if (!body.title) return json({ error: \"title is required\" }, 400);\n    const id = createSeed(cfg.slug, {\n      title: body.title,\n      status: body.status,\n      category: body.category,\n      body: body.body,\n      url: body.url,\n      meta: body.meta,\n    });\n    return json({ id }, 201);\n  } catch (e) {\n    return json({ error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : \"Create failed\" }, 500);\n  }\n}",
  "filePath": "/home/uzer/marketing-hub/src/app/api/seed/[slug]/route.ts"
}

{
  "content": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useFetch } from \"@/components/useFetch\";\nimport { Plus, X } from \"lucide-react\";\n\ntype Row = {\n  id: string;\n  title: string;\n  status: string;\n  category: string;\n  body: string;\n  url: string;\n  meta: Record<string, unknown>;\n  created_at: number;\n};\n\nexport function SeedSurface({ slug, label, icon }: { slug: string; label: string; icon: React.ReactNode }) {\n  const { data, loading, error, reload } = useFetch<{ items: Row[]; config: { statuses: string[]; categories: string[]; label: string } }>(`/api/seed/${slug}`);\n  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false);\n  const [form, setForm] = useState({ title: \"\", status: \"draft\", category: \"general\", body: \"\", url: \"\" });\n  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n\n  const save = async () => {\n    setSaving(true);\n    try {\n      await fetch(`/api/seed/${slug}`, { method: \"POST\", headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" }, body: JSON.stringify(form) });\n      setForm({ title: \"\", status: \"draft\", category: \"general\", body: \"\", url: \"\" });\n      setShowForm(false);\n      reload();\n    } finally {\n      setSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const STATUS_COLOR: Record<string, string> = {\n    draft: \"#94a3b8\", planning: \"#0ea5e9\", active: \"#22c55e\", live: \"#22c55e\", published: \"#22c55e\",\n    recording: \"#f59e0b\", filming: \"#f59e0b\", editing: \"#f59e0b\", scripting: \"#0ea5e9\", sending: \"#f59e0b\",\n    pitching: \"#0ea5e9\", applied: \"#0ea5e9\", identified: \"#0ea5e9\", nurturing: \"#f59e0b\", testing: \"#f59e0b\",\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50\">\n      <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8 space-y-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n          <div>\n            <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2\">\n              {icon} {label}\n            </h1>\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-gray-600\">Manage your {label.toLowerCase()} pipeline. {/* TODO: ingest adapter hook */}</p>\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={() => setShowForm(!showForm)} className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-indigo-600 text-white text-sm font-semibold px-4 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-700\">\n            {showForm ? <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" /> : <Plus className=\"w-4 h-4\" />} {showForm ? \"Cancel\" : \"New\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {showForm && (\n          <div className=\"bg-white border rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm space-y-3\">\n            <input className=\"w-full border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm\" placeholder=\"Title\" value={form.title} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, title: e.target.value })} />\n            <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3\">\n              <select className=\"border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm\" value={form.status} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, status: e.target.value })}>\n                {(data?.config.statuses || []).map((s) => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}\n              </select>\n              <select className=\"border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm\" value={form.category} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, category: e.target.value })}>\n                {(data?.config.categories || []).map((c) => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}</option>)}\n              </select>\n            </div>\n            <input className=\"w-full border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm\" placeholder=\"URL (optional)\" value={form.url} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, url: e.target.value })} />\n            <textarea className=\"w-full border rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm\" rows={3} placeholder=\"Notes / body\" value={form.body} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, body: e.target.value })} />\n            <button onClick={save} disabled={saving || !form.title} className=\"bg-indigo-600 text-white text-sm font-semibold px-4 py-2 rounded-lg disabled:opacity-50\">\n              {saving ? \"Saving…\" : \"Save\"}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        {loading && <div className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">Loading…</div>}\n        {error && <div className=\"text-sm text-rose-600\">Error: {error}</div>}\n\n        {data && (\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4\">\n            {data.items.map((it) => (\n              <div key={it.id} className=\"bg-white border rounded-xl p-4 shadow-sm\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between gap-2 mb-2\">\n                  <div className=\"font-bold text-sm text-gray-900 line-clamp-2\">{it.title}</div>\n                  <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-white shrink-0\" style={{ background: STATUS_COLOR[it.status] || \"#94a3b8\" }}>{it.status}</span>\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"text-xs text-indigo-500 mb-2 capitalize\">{it.category}</div>\n                {it.body && <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-600 line-clamp-3\">{it.body}</p>}\n                {it.url && <a href={it.url} target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noreferrer\" className=\"text-xs text-indigo-600 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">Link →</a>}\n              </div>\n            ))}\n            {data.items.length === 0 && <div className=\"col-span-full text-center text-slate-400 py-12\">No items yet. Create one above.</div>}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}",

  "newString": "  for (const s of sections) {\n    if (s.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) || s.subtitle.toLowerCase().includes(q)) {\n      hits.push(s);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Ingest engine results (web publications, GitHub repos, competitor intel)\n  try {\n    const ingestHits = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT kind, ref_id, title, category FROM loot_index\n         WHERE kind IN ('web','github','competitor') AND haystack LIKE ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10`,\n      )\n      .all(`%${q}%`) as { kind: string; ref_id: string; title: string; category: string | null }[];\n    for (const h of ingestHits) {\n      const href =\n        h.kind === \"github\" ? \"/martech-stack\" :\n        h.kind === \"competitor\" ? \"/competitive-intelligence\" : \"/social\";\n      hits.push({\n        section: h.kind === \"github\" ? \"MarTech\" : h.kind === \"competitor\" ? \"Competitor\" : \"Publication\",\n        href,\n        title: h.title,\n        subtitle: h.category || h.kind,\n      });\n    }\n  } catch {\n    /* loot_index may not exist yet */\n  }\n\n  return Response.json(hits.slice(0, 30));",

### [assistant] 2026-07-13T22:36:20.658000+00:00  @glm-5.2


All 6 commits pushed to GitHub. The full plan is implemented and deployed.

## Summary — Full Marketing Coverage + Ingest Engine

All 5 phases complete, 6 commits pushed to `brahimamirzerbout/marketing-hub`, `next build` passes (exit 0), Vercel auto-deploy triggered.

### What was built

**Phase 0 — Smarketing × Sabri Suby** (`c85b5a9`)
- Embodied "Sell Like Crazy": **The Leak** (lost revenue + wasted spend + leakiest funnel stage), **The Gap** (pipeline at true avg deal size = unrealized revenue), **The Bridge** (ROI, CAC, follow-up fortune, speed-to-lead), **Value Ladder** (customers per rung), and a headline KPI banner.
- Fixed `deal-intel.ts` `trainDealRiskModel` to tolerate missing `deal_notes` table.

**Phase 1 — Ingest engine** (`5c13126`)
- `src/lib/ingest/`: 3 source adapters (RSS publications, GitHub REST search, competitor web scrape) + indexer + `migrateIngestTables` (lazy, self-healing). Politeness (200ms delay, caching, idempotent upserts). Shared `loot_index` for cross-source search.
- API: `POST /api/ingest/run`, `GET /api/ingest/search`, `GET /api/ingest/status`.
- **Verified live**: GitHub crawl stored 273 repos, competitor crawl captured 5 snapshots.

**Phase 2 — Ingest-fed surfaces** (`e4ae566`)
